message:
feat(core): add headless/federated mux server for remote fleet control (ft-3681t.2.6)

Production-grade headless mux server mode with remote control channels,
federation management, and peer health monitoring. Provides the protocol
layer for multi-host swarm operations without GUI coupling.

Key types: ServerNodeId, PeerInfo, ServerConfig, RemoteRequest/Response,
HeadlessMuxServer. 20+ inline tests covering ping/pong, status, entity
listing, checkpoint/rollback, federation join/leave/heartbeat, peer
health checks, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
